info.title: Motorzad API Documentation
info.description: API Documentation for Motorzad Car Auctions Platform.

post.description: Registers a new bidder and sends a verification link to their email.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: Registration successful. Please verify your email via the link sent.

post.description: Logs in a user and returns an authentication token. Supports login using either email or phone number.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: These credentials do not match our records.

get.description: Returns the details of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Logs out the authenticated user by revoking their access token.
Sends a 6-digit verification code to the user's email if it is registered in our records.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: User with this email does not exist.

post.summary: Check if reset code is valid
post.description: Validates the 6-digit code sent to the email.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Updates the user's password using the validated 6-digit reset code.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

get.description: Validates the signature of the email verification link sent to the user and marks email as verified.

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA-1 hash of the user's email

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Resends the signed verification link to the authenticated user's email address.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Updates the profile details of the currently authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Changes the password of the currently authenticated user after verifying the current password.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: The provided password does not match your current password.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the currently authenticated user account and revokes all active tokens.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: Your account has been permanently deleted.
The provided password does not match your current password.

post.description: Generates a 6-digit OTP and sends it via phone or email. In local or debug mode, the code is returned in the response for easy testing.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Verifies the OTP code. If correct and user exists, authenticates them. If they do not exist, automatically registers them as a bidder and returns access token.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)
